description: Paused-extended bug — extend() previously mutated ends_at (instead of writing grace_period_ends_at). Fixture captures a cycle whose ends_at moved past its original boundary AND a `metadata.extensions[]` entry that records the original ends_at value, surfacing the discrepancy. Invariant: INV-F2 (extend MUST NOT mutate ends_at). The checker's audit-log read can also flag this when a `subscription_audit_log` row for action='extend' shows ends_at_before != ends_at_after.
notes: Recovery requires resetting the cycle's ends_at to the value captured in metadata.extensions[].ends_at_at_time AND populating grace_period_ends_at with the originally-intended grace value. Not auto-recoverable — left to operator triage.
